title: Almond Capsule Manifest
description: Sidecar manifest (<name>.capsule.json) that turns a Grasshopper definition into a capsule: a file plus a typed input/output contract. Binding is exact NickName match on reserved ALMOND_IN_* / ALMOND_OUT_* parameter names inside the GHX. Manifests with audited=false are retrieval context only; run_definition refuses them.

version.description: Manifest revision. Bump when the contract changes.

capability.description: What the capsule does when run.

structure_type.description: Optional archetype key used by validate_structure, e.g. beam, truss, shell.

plugin_dependencies.description: Grasshopper plugins the definition needs, with minimum versions.

definition_file.description: Filename of the Grasshopper definition this manifest describes. Filename only, no directory.

description_for_llm.description: When to use this capsule, its assumptions, and its limits. Written for an LLM choosing between capsules. Be honest.

inputs.description: Typed input contract. Each entry maps to a GH param whose NickName equals the reserved name exactly.

outputs.description: Typed output contract. Each entry maps to a GH param whose NickName equals the reserved name exactly.

binding.description: Binding strategy. Only exact reserved NickName matching is supported.

confidence.description: Analysis pathway quality this capsule represents. api > template > rule_based.

audited.description: True only after harness params with the reserved NickNames exist in the GHX and the contract was verified by a human run. False means retrieval context only; run_definition refuses the capsule.

value_type.description: Wire type at the boundary. [] means a flat list.

name.description: Reserved NickName the GH param must carry, e.g. ALMOND_IN_LINES.

units.description: Declared units, e.g. m, mm, kN, kN/m2. Units are declared, never guessed; the bridge converts explicitly at the boundary.

default.description: Default value used when a non required input is not supplied.

name.description: Reserved NickName the GH param must carry, e.g. ALMOND_OUT_DISP_MM.

units.description: Declared units of the emitted value.

semantics.description: Machine readable meaning, e.g. max_nodal_displacement, per_element_utilization, total_mass.
